titleStmt.title: SII 22.67: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 67. (A.R. No. 67 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. RĀJ. TRIBH. KULŌTTUṄGA (II)—3rd YEAR (A.D. 1135-36)

summary.p: This records a gift of 64 cows for burning two perpetual lamps in the temple of Tāntōṉṟi-Āḷuḍaiyār at Śaṇbai alias Vīrarājēndrapuram in Śeṅkuṉṟa-nāḍu on the north bank of the Peṇṇai river, by one Aḍiyanambi Kōvalarāyappēraiyaṉ of Muḍiyanūr in Kīḻkoṉṟai-nāḍu on the southern bank, as atonement demanded of him by the members of the Chitramēḻi community (of artisans or cultivators ?) of the 79 nāḍu, for having killed by accident a certain Poṉpaṟṟi-uḍaiyāṉ Kuṉṟaṉ Śīruḍaiyāṉ, a Veḷḷāḷa resident of Vāḻaiveṭṭi in their nāḍu (Śeṅkuṉṟa-nāḍu). The arrow shot by him at an animal probably in a hunt, is said to have missed its aim and pierced this Śīruḍaiyāṉ instead.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . ko Irājakecari panmarāna tribhuvanac cakkarava
ttikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3Āvatu
vāṇakoppāṭi rājarājavaḷanāṭṭup peṇṇait tenkarai
kkiḻkoṉṟaināṭṭu muṭiyaṉūrirukkum paḷḷiceri Aṭiyanam
piyāṉa kovalarāyapperaiyaṉ meṟpaṭināṭṭup peṇṇai vaṭa
karaic ceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭu vāḷaiveṭṭiyil Irukkum veḷḷāḷaṉ po
ṉpaṟṟiyuṭaiyāṉ kuṉṟaṉ ciruṭaiyāṉaik kovalarāyar(yar) vai
vaṭaiyile Ivaṉ ceri Aṭiyanampi virukattai Eyya piḻai
ccu Icciruṭaiyāṉmele Ampupaṭappaṭṭamaiyil Eḻu
pattoṉpatu nāṭṭuc cittirameḻipperiyanāṭuṅ kūṭi
iruntu Ikkovalarāyap peraiyaṉmele paḻiyākki Ivan
melintap paḻitirak koṇṭa naṭaiyāvatu Iṉnāṭṭuc ca
ṇpaiyāna virarājendrapurattu Uṭaiyār tiruttān ton
ṟi Āḷḷuṭaiyār śrī koyilile Iraṇṭu tirununtāvi
ḷakku vaikkakkaṭavanākki Ivan viṭṭa cāvāmuvāppacu
Aṟupattunālu Ippacu Aṟupattu nāluṅ kaikko
ṇṭom Ikkoyilil tiruvuṇṇāḻikai sabhaiyom
candrādittaval Itu panmāyiśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.67 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
